texts: Changed the click behavior on the community rankings page to allow users to more easily rate things or view reviews.
Changed the name of the Hardwood Liquor Cup choice event (it previously stated Bamboo Hat and Dopo Robe).

body.text: The numbers that show up when creating or deleting ratings in the rankings page are currently bugged. This is purely visual and will be fixed soon. Refreshing the page will fix it for now.
